title: Player Grave
description: Tired of losing your items when you die? With the player grave option, your items will be safely stored in a grave, ready for you to reclaim when you return to the battle!
body:
# Player Grave Datapack

The Player Graves datapack saves your items and XP upon death, allowing you to reclaim everything
from a personalized grave! 

You can retrieve your belongings, dig up others’ graves, and even earn unique advancements along the way.\
With a custom grave model using item displays and player heads!

## Requirements
- keepInventory must be on! => [/gamerule keepInventory true]
- you do need internet to download the custom heads

## Special Display
### The Grave will Stand on a lily pad if you die in/on water
![Grave On Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70258ef83e92eb01a617fd99eefa1ae240b1f4ba.png)
### The Grave will Stand on a Stone Pillar if you die in/on lava
![Grave On Lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b85f541ee929b4ccc6ad8fb93945f9b974ab9a0.png)
### The Grave will break with sound effects & particles!
![Grave Break](https://i.imgur.com/QFhkTxN.gif)
### The Grave will Decay Over Time With Different Models [1h to fully delete 20m each state]!
![Decay State](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c22fcb8225c208e61541ddb845957185cbbced.png)
Original Model By: Workshop Six
- [https://mcmodels.net/products/12671/tombstones](https://mcmodels.net/products/12671/tombstones)
